entries.title: Live Server: Remote Unauthenticated File Exfiltration
entries.description: Live Server (72M+ downloads) allows remote unauthenticated access to files served by the extension. Affects Cursor and Windsurf users. Update to latest version or disable the extension.

entries.title: Python Extension: Older versions lack workspace trust enforcement
entries.description: Python extension versions prior to 2024 may execute code in untrusted workspaces without prompting for trust. Update to 2024.0.0 or later.

entries.title: Code Spell Checker: Reads all workspace files including sensitive config
entries.description: Versions prior to 3.0.0 read all workspace files for spell checking, including .env and credential files. Update to 3.0.0+ which respects .gitignore and excludes config files.

entries.title: Remote SSH: Credential forwarding without explicit consent in older versions
entries.description: Remote SSH extension versions prior to 0.107.0 may forward SSH agent credentials to remote hosts without explicit per-connection consent.

entries.title: Vim Extension: Arbitrary command execution via modelines in older versions
entries.description: VSCodeVim versions prior to 1.27.0 may execute arbitrary commands via vim modelines in opened files.
